title: JustImprovedMC
description: Fabric 1.20.1 | This modpack improves minecraft while keeping it the same game.
body:
**This modpack improves minecraft while keeping it the same game.**

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd0c5b9909fbb63ad5df563c16e028b0d8657ef2.png)

- Optimized with Shader Support
- New game mechanics
- Mod Create and its addons
- New food and drinks
- Overhauled World Generation
